comments.html: It was an American company, but a different first letter (not that I would expect anything different from any of the large conglomerates).
comments.name: Ivan Pepelnjak

comments.html: It can only be the American company beginning with C.
comments.name: Anonymous

comments.html:
That unfortunately is the same issue I have with TACs recently - they try as much as possible to drop the case or use generic "solutions" like reboots and upgrades.

I would rather blame companies policies or how they try to make support teams more lean.
comments.name: Michał Margula
